memberdef.argsstring: (computational_domain infra, maxwell_yee< vdim > *mw_yee, amrex::Real coeff, amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim, ndata >>, numspec > &part_gr, timers *profiling_timers, bool profiling_count)
memberdef.name: time_loop_hs_zigzag_C2_step

param.type: amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim, ndata >>, numspec > &

briefdescription.para: This is the time propagator with a Hamiltonian splitting in a FEM formulation with mass lumping for Lagrange elements of order one and zero.

detaileddescription.para: This propagator is currently not implemented for the 2d2v case. In this case, the operator H_p3 is dismissed and the operators H_p1 and H_p2 must be reimplemented only producing the b3 updates. In principle the operators are exactly the same but they should just return one bfield value - the one that concerns b_z - and it should read out the first component of the bfield vector (which saves the b_z in this case).

memberdef.argsstring: (computational_domain infra, maxwell_yee< vdim > *mw_yee, amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim, ndata >>, numspec > &part_gr, diagnostics< vdim, numspec, degx, degy, degz, degmw > *diagn, MultiReducedDiags< vdim, numspec, degx, degy, degz, degmw, ndata > *redDiagn, bool ctest, std::string simulation_name, int strang_order)
memberdef.name: time_loop_hs_zigzag_C2

param.type: amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim, ndata >>, numspec > &
diagnostics< vdim, numspec, degx, degy, degz, degmw > *
MultiReducedDiags< vdim, numspec, degx, degy, degz, degmw, ndata > *
